Boats A Reading A-Z Level B Leveled Book Word Count: 32 Connections Writing and Art Which boat do you think is the most interesting? Why? Draw a picture and write about it. Social Studies Boats are used to carry things on the water: How are things carried on land or in the air? Discuss your ideas with a partner: Reading A-Z Visit wwwreadinga-z.com for thousands of books and materials.
